html:
Exclusive to:  

Dropped Bee Mine and armed Bee Mine.

A Bee Mine is a Fight Tab Item that releases Bees on a mob that steps on it. It requires 1 Board, 4 Bees, and 1 Flint to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

To lay a Bee Mine, it must be placed on the ground with the right mouse button (the left mouse button will simply drop the mine). Placed mines will become armed a second after being placed. If a player has mines in the Caves and dies, the mines will disarm themselves and must be set again.

When a creature comes near enough to the Bee Mine, it explodes, spawning four regular Bees who are aggressive to whatever triggered the mine. Afterwards, the Bees behave identically to other hiveless Bees. If the Bees from the Mine are attacked by their target, other Bees from either Bee Boxes or Bee Hives will come to help. Surviving Bees will remain and can be caught with a Bug Net to make another mine. Catching them counts as aggression, and if there were others nearby assisting against the bomb target, those will attack the player, too. 

Bees, Killer Bees, Butterflies, Batilisks, Mosquitoes, and Shadow Creatures cannot activate Bee Mines.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal "Will You Bee Mine?" skin was awarded for playing Don't Starve Together around Valentine's Day 2022.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Pig King Collection
Exploding Jar of Bees
Disguise your beemine as a jar of preserves.
See ingame
Loyal
Heart Collection
Will You Bee Mine?
It's full of warm, fuzzy, stinging, and angry feelings.

Trivia

  • The Bee Mine was added in the The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You update.
  • In the old research system, its research cost was 100.
  • Sometimes two Bee Mines will spawn next to a Skeleton as a Set Piece. These can be safely picked up.
  • Placed Bee Mines have the option to be smashed with Hammer, with predictable results.

Bugs

  • Multiple Bee Mines can cause render lag as they are constantly pulsating.
  • Sometimes, the mine can trigger while in a Chest, a Backpack, or even the inventory without being placed.

Gallery

  • Bee Mine as seen in the poster for the The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You update.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
Craftable ItemsStructures

Exclusive to:
“It buzzes when I shake it.”
–Wilson
“Bees inside. Should've put some fire in there for good measure.”
–Willow
“Is ball full of angry bees.”
–Wolfgang
“They're still alive in there. Poor things.”
–Wendy
“IMPROVISED STINGING DEVICE”
–WX-78
“A dangerous mine filled with Antophila.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't know if the bees like this.”
–Woodie
“They wait so patiently.”
–Maxwell
“An absolute revelation agrarian warfare.”
–Wagstaff
“It söunds suspiciöus.”
–Wigfrid
“Would you bee mine?”
–Webber
“It's like a confetti bomb. But bees.”
–Walani
“Weaponized bees.”
–Warly
“Step 'n get stung.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS EXPLOD'TH WITH BEES”
–Wilba
“Buzz Ka-bloey!”
–Wormwood
“If those bees were nicer to me, I might feel sorry for them.”
–Wheeler
“Sounds like the hum of an engine.”
–Winona
“This will be a funny prank.”
–Wortox
“Careful, florp!”
–Wurt
“W-what could go wrong?”
–Walter
“You come after me, you get the bees!”
–Wanda

A Bee Mine is a Fight Tab Item that releases Bees on a mob that steps on it. It requires 1 Board, 4 Bees, and 1 Flint to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

Afterwards, the Bees behave identically to other hiveless Bees. If the Bees from the Mine are attacked by their target, other Bees from either Bee Boxes or Bee Hives will come to help. Surviving Bees will remain and can be caught with a Bug Net to make another mine. Catching them counts as aggression, and if there were others nearby assisting against the bomb target, those will attack the player, too.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mỏ Ong là một Vật phẩm trong Thẻ Chiến đấu giải phóng Ong khi mob giẫm lên nó. Nó cần 1 Ván Gỗ, 4 Con Ong và 1 Đá Lửa để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu.

It requires 1 [[Board]], 4 Bees, and 1 [[Flint]] to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. To lay a Bee Mine, it must be placed on the ground with the right mouse button (the left mouse button will simply drop the mine). Placed mines will become armed a second after being placed. If a player has mines in the [[Caves]] and dies, the mines will disarm themselves and must be set again. When a creature comes near enough to the Bee Mine, it explodes, spawning four regular Bees who are aggressive to whatever triggered the mine. Afterwards, the Bees behave identically to other hiveless Bees. If the Bees from the Mine are attacked by their target, other Bees from either [[Bee Box]]es or [[Bee Hive]]s will come to help. Surviving Bees will remain and can be caught with a [[Bug Net]] to make another mine. Catching them counts as aggression, and if there were others nearby assisting against the bomb target, those will attack the player, too.  [[Bee]]s, [[Killer Bee]]s, [[Butterfly|Butterflies]], [[Batilisk]]s, [[Mosquito]]es, and [[Shadow Creature]]s cannot activate Bee Mines. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Weapons Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal''' '''"Will You Bee Mine?"''' skin was awarded for playing ''Don't Starve Together'' around Valentine's Day 2022.
